# OS Technology

OS Technology is a UK-based managed IT services provider (MSP) and certified Microsoft 365 partner, offering IT support for home users and growing businesses across East Riding of Yorkshire and the UK.

## Key Pages

- [Home – UK Based IT Support & Managed IT Services](https://ostechnology.uk/)
- [About OS Technology](https://ostechnology.uk/about.html)
- [Home IT Support Services](https://ostechnology.uk/services/home.html)
- [Business IT Services](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business.html)
- [Managed IT Support for Business](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/it-support.html)
- [Microsoft 365 Setup & Migration](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/microsoft-365.html)
- [Business Cybersecurity](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/cybersecurity.html)
- [Device Support & Procurement](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/device-support.html)
- [New Device Provision](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/new-devices.html)
- [Web Presence & Hosting](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/web-presence.html)
- [AI & Microsoft Copilot](https://ostechnology.uk/services/business/ai.html)
- [Areas We Cover – IT Support Across East Riding](https://ostechnology.uk/locations)
- [Industries We Support – Sector IT Support](https://ostechnology.uk/industries)

## Local & Industry Landing Pages

OS Technology publishes location-specific IT support pages for towns across the East Riding of Yorkshire (Hull, Beverley, Bridlington, Goole, Driffield, Cottingham, Hessle, Pocklington, Withernsea, Hedon, Howden and Market Weighton) at https://ostechnology.uk/locations, and industry-specific pages for office-based sectors (accountants, solicitors, estate agents, financial advisers, recruitment agencies, architects, insurance brokers, marketing agencies and charities) at https://ostechnology.uk/industries. Industry pages cover the IT foundation OS Technology manages — Microsoft 365, devices, cybersecurity and backup — not third-party line-of-business software, which is supported by its own vendors.

## Description

OS Technology provides remote-first IT support with no call centres and no jargon. Services include Microsoft 365 deployment and migration, cybersecurity auditing, device procurement, cloud storage (Nextcloud), web presence management, and fully managed IT support plans (Starter, Standard, Premium).

## Contact

- Email: hello@ostechnology.uk
- Website: https://ostechnology.uk/
- Area served: East Riding of Yorkshire and UK-wide (remote)
